description: emit ready-to-use Trainer configurations (basic, debug, single-GPU, DDP, FSDP, DeepSpeed, reproducible, etc.)
rules: read-only: produces a local .py of Trainer factory functions, never starts a training run
config source is written to record_store/${OUT_NAME}; validation stdout goes to trainer_setup.log
emitting the template needs no heavy lib; the optional validation run needs lightning installed
usage: Set OUT_NAME (the .py filename to write). Output: record_store/${OUT_NAME} + trainer_setup.log.
limitation: Emits ten configuration factories only — multi-GPU/TPU, FSDP and DeepSpeed strategies require the matching hardware and installs at actual training time.
